lyrics.title: Party For Everybody
lyrics.content:

Come on and dance
Come on and dance
Come on and boom boom

lyrics.title: حفلة للجميع
lyrics.content:
أنا أنشر مفرش لطاولة بعناية، في انتظار أطفالي

lyrics.title: Fête pour tout le monde
lyrics.content:
J'étale soigneusement la nappe en attendant mes enfants
La pâte lève et mon cœur se réjouit

Fête pour tout le monde — dansez

Venez et dansez
Venez et boum boum

La maison est pleine de mes chers enfants, qui viennent de rentrer

Je vais mettre une robe verte et un châle rouge

lyrics.title: Party For Everybody
lyrics.content:
I'm spreading a tablecloth carefully, waiting for my children
The dough is rising and my heart is cheering

Party for everybody – dance
Come on and dance
Come on and dance
Come on and boom boom

The house is full of my dear children, who have just returned
The house is full of my dear children, who have just returned
I am going to put on a green dress and a red shawl

Singing loudly boom boom boom, dancing soulfully, soulfully
Singing loudly boom boom boom, all together

Party for everybody – dance
Come on and dance
Come on and dance
Come on and
Party for everybody – dance
Come on and dance
Come on and dance
Come on and boom boom

The cat is happy, the dog is happy
The cat is happy, the dog is happy
We are in a wonderful mood and very happy

lyrics.content:

La masa sube y mi corazón se alegra
